_description: Multi-language quotes for InnerRelease App. Each language has its own file under quotes/ directory.

quotes.id: Unique ID, must match across all language files (q1-q151)
quotes.author: Localized author name
quotes.authorOriginal: Original author name (omit for Latin-script languages: en, es, fr, pt, vi, id)

_display_rules.non_latin_scripts: author (authorOriginal) — e.g. 海尔·德沃斯金 (Hale Dwoskin)
